content.fact: Cartographer should evolve into an orchestrator of pluggable extractors. LocalFilesystemExtractor (shipped v0.8) covers code/docs/commits/deps/TODOs. GitHubMCPExtractor (future) would add issues/PRs/discussions/wiki — semantic context not in the filesystem. The Extractor interface already exists internally; framework is nearly ready.
content.source: Architecture discussion 2026-04-19. User confirmed: not for v0.9, valid for later.
content.why: Local filesystem and GitHub API extract semantically different knowledge. Local gets code structure; GitHub gets discussion/decisions about code. Both produce memories but from distinct sources. Air-gapped users get full value from local-only; GitHub users get richer context with opt-in GitHub layer.
